description_long: This is a modern delivery van with a white exterior and prominent FedEx branding on the hood, sides, and rear. The van features a streamlined, compact cargo body with a slightly rounded roof and large, tinted windows on the front and sides. The front end has a black grille, integrated headlights, and side mirrors extending from the doors. The side profile reveals a sliding door on the passenger side and minimal decorative trim, emphasizing utility. The rear is flat with two vertical doors, a rear window, and additional FedEx branding. The van sits on four silver wheels with black tires, and its overall design is optimized for urban package delivery.
description: A white FedEx-branded delivery van with a compact, streamlined cargo body, sliding side door, and rear double doors. It features tinted windows, black trim, and silver wheels, designed for urban package transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the FedEx logo on the hood, black grille, headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large FedEx logo, sliding side door, and two visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the FedEx logo, rear double doors, and a small rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with FedEx branding, sliding door, and window arrangement.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
